estimated_cost_impact_reasoning: 100% consolidated Section 301 tariff on all CN-origin materials. Source: MRP tariff_sweep at 100%. Adjusted cost $7,800/kg vs baseline $5,208/kg — a 49.8% increase.
estimated_timeline_reasoning: At 100% tariff, economic incentive to source outside CN likely triggers supply chain rebalancing over 12–18 months, but no immediate lead-time impact.
caveats: Does not model secondary effects: CN suppliers may exit US market entirely, triggering shortages.
SM-A sole-source risk amplified — only one CN supplier currently qualified.
